pyepo.model.omo.knapsack
========================

.. py:module:: pyepo.model.omo.knapsack

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   Knapsack problem



Attributes
----------

.. autoapisummary::

   pyepo.model.omo.knapsack.cost


Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   pyepo.model.omo.knapsack.knapsackModel
   pyepo.model.omo.knapsack.knapsackModelRel


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: knapsackModel(weights: numpy.ndarray | list, capacity: numpy.ndarray | list, solver: str = 'glpk')

   Bases: :py:obj:`pyepo.model.omo.omomodel.optOmoModel`


   This class is an optimization model for the knapsack problem

   :ivar _model: Pyomo model
   :vartype _model: Pyomo model
   :ivar solver: optimization solver in the background
   :vartype solver: str
   :ivar weights: weights of items
   :vartype weights: np.ndarray
   :ivar capacity: total capacity
   :vartype capacity: np.ndarray
   :ivar items: list of item index

   :vartype items: list


   .. py:attribute:: weights


   .. py:attribute:: capacity


   .. py:attribute:: items


   .. py:method:: relax() -> knapsackModelRel

      A method to get linear relaxation model



.. py:class:: knapsackModelRel(weights: numpy.ndarray | list, capacity: numpy.ndarray | list, solver: str = 'glpk')

   Bases: :py:obj:`knapsackModel`


   This class is relaxed optimization model for knapsack problem.


   .. py:method:: relax() -> knapsackModelRel

      A forbidden method to relax MIP model



.. py:data:: cost
